Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static OptionalValidator DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(Optional<?> actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an Optional.
    OptionalValidator Requirements.validateThat​(Optional<?> actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an Optional.

  • Uses of OptionalValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return OptionalValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    OptionalValidator OptionalValidator.contains​(Object value)
    Ensures that the optional contains a value.
    OptionalValidator OptionalValidator.contains​(Object expected, String name)
    Ensures that the optional contains the expected value.
    OptionalValidator OptionalValidator.isEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty.
    OptionalValidator OptionalValidator.isPresent()
    Ensures that the actual value is present.
    OptionalValidator JavaRequirements.validateThat​(Optional<?> actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an Optional.
